response: {"action": "sql", "sql": "SELECT d.dept_nm, p.prod_id, p.prod_nm, SUM(r.rtn_amt) AS tot_rtn_amt FROM ord_rtn r JOIN ord_ln l ON r.ord_ln_id = l.ord_ln_id JOIN prod_ref p ON l.prod_id = p.prod_id JOIN dept_dim d ON p.dept_cd = d.dept_cd GROUP BY d.dept_nm, p.prod_id, p.prod_nm ORDER BY tot_rtn_amt DESC", "reason": ""}
